mapper.select: select * from mem_statistics where subject_type = #{subjectType} and subject_id = #{subjectId} and visit_date = #{visitDate}
select ifnull(sum(visit_count), 0) from mem_statistics where subject_type = #{subjectType} and subject_id = #{subjectId}
select ifnull(sum(message_count), 0) from mem_statistics where subject_type = #{subjectType} and subject_id = #{subjectId}
select ifnull(sum(flower_count), 0) from mem_statistics where subject_type = #{subjectType} and subject_id = #{subjectId}
select distinct subject_id from mem_statistics where subject_type = #{subjectType}
mapper.insert: insert into mem_statistics (subject_type, subject_id, visit_date, visit_count, message_count, flower_count) values (#{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{visitDate}, #{visitCount}, #{messageCount}, #{flowerCount})
mapper.update: insert into mem_statistics (subject_type, subject_id, visit_date, visit_count, message_count, flower_count) values (#{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{visitDate}, 1, 0, 0) on duplicate key update visit_count = visit_count + 1

insert into mem_statistics (subject_type, subject_id, visit_date, visit_count, message_count, flower_count) values (#{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{visitDate}, 0, 1, 0) on duplicate key update message_count = message_count + 1

insert into mem_statistics (subject_type, subject_id, visit_date, visit_count, message_count, flower_count) values (#{subjectType}, #{subjectId}, #{visitDate}, 0, 0, 1) on duplicate key update flower_count = flower_count + 1
mapper.delete:
delete from mem_statistics where stat_id in
#{statId}
